paths.from: 榆林市地理坐标信息文件
2019年中国榆林市30m数字高程数据集
榆林市卫星遥感数据集图像分割文件

properties.ymlContent:
version: "3"
services:
  gully_slop-53826edfc71f4685bb88d6c59f620a55:
    image: "registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/bigflow/geo_entropy.py-1672748449294:3.7.5"
    extra_hosts:bigflow_extra_hosts
    hostname: gully_slop-53826edfc71f4685bb88d6c59f620a55
    container_name: gully_slop-53826edfc71f4685bb88d6c59f620a55
    environment:
      - hdfs_url=bigflow_hdfs_url
      - TZ=Asia/Shanghai
    volumes:
      - ../app:/app
      - /data/nfs/:/data/nfs/
      - /data1/nfs:/data1/nfs
      - /data/instdb:/data/instdb
    command: python3 /pythonDir/gully_slop.py /demo.csv 
    network_mode: bridge

version: "3"
services:
  hydro_susceptibility-e6523ad41cb94446a70a8bca0698a44f:
    image: "registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/bigflow/geo_entropy.py-1672748449294:3.7.5"
    extra_hosts:bigflow_extra_hosts
    hostname: hydro_susceptibility-e6523ad41cb94446a70a8bca0698a44f
    container_name: hydro_susceptibility-e6523ad41cb94446a70a8bca0698a44f
    environment:
      - hdfs_url=bigflow_hdfs_url
      - TZ=Asia/Shanghai
    volumes:
      - ../app:/app
      - /data/nfs/:/data/nfs/
      - /data1/nfs:/data1/nfs
      - /data/instdb:/data/instdb
    command: python3 /pythonDir/hydro_susceptibility.py /demo.csv 
    network_mode: bridge

stops.name: 榆林市地理坐标信息文件
